label: rigid_safe
style_positioning: Conservative corporate medical communication prioritizing clarity, compliance, and risk control.
sentence_patterns: 在...前提下，...可被审慎采用。
基于现有证据，优先建议...路径。
需要先明确...，再进入...决策。
与其强调突破，不如强调可控与可执行。
rhetorical_devices: Prioritize non-inflated claims and explicit caveats
Frame recommendations as controlled implementation steps
